lines: Butters is living his best life after Portugal absolutely dicked Croft's Uzbekistan 5-0 — five fucking nil, Croft, did you even watch it? That's not a football team, that's a PE lesson.

Colombia are top of Group K with a perfect record, which is great news for Carter and The Foreman, slightly less great for Butters whose DR Congo are now dangling off the edge of elimination like a man who's had one too many.
England managed a heroic 0-0 with Ghana, so Carter and Wilmot can both get in the fucking bin — top of the group on goal difference but playing like they've got somewhere better to be.

Today's big one: Morocco vs Haiti in Group C, and Butters, Callum, Jim and Wilmot are all on that gravy train — if Morocco can't beat Haiti they should be ashamed of themselves, but at least four of you cunts will be happy.
Keep an eye on Bosnia vs Qatar — Dene desperately needs Bosnia to stop being absolutely shit, and Jim needs Qatar to do the same, so frankly that game is just two losers fighting over scraps.
